G17_anchor_paraphrase_correction.context: G17-LAYER-SEPARATION-LIT-ANCHOR Phase B.3 anchor recorded BLMP 2024 §4.1 wording as 'after Jimbo-Miwa 1981 II'.
G17_anchor_paraphrase_correction.verbatim_finding: BLMP 2024 §4.1 page 24 actual wording is 'Following Jimbo and Miwa [24], ...'. The G17 'after' is a paraphrase, not a verbatim quote.
G17_anchor_paraphrase_correction.impact: No effect on G17 conclusion (BLMP still attributes the JM81 II isomonodromic Lax-pair construction). Recommend G17 anchor be amended in any CT v1.4 §3.5 narrative to use the verbatim 'Following ... [24]' wording for AEAL hygiene.

transitive_indication_CT_4tuple_not_from.context: Phase D Section D.4 finds via BLMP transitive reading that JM81 II's core Lax-pair convention is 2-parameter (ϴ_0, ϴ_∞), incompatible with the CT v1.3 §3.5 4-tuple (α_∞, α_0, β_∞, β_0)=(1/6, 0, 0, -1/2).
transitive_indication_CT_4tuple_not_from.verbatim_finding: BLMP eq (4.6) page 25: 'ϴ_0 = α/4, ϴ_∞ = 1 - β/4'. Two parameters, not four; symbol family (ϴ vs α/β) and indexing (0,∞ vs ∞,0,∞,0 doubly) both differ from the CT 4-tuple.
transitive_indication_CT_4tuple_not_from.impact: If primary-source ILL acquisition confirms BLMP's transitive reading, then CT v1.3 §3.5's 4-tuple is NOT from JM81 II at the level of the core Lax-pair convention. Combined with the prior OKAMOTO-1987-CONSTRAINT-PIN verdict (which already excluded Okamoto 1987 W(B_2) as the source), Sakai 2001 D_6 surface root-system convention becomes the residual canonical candidate. This elevates Prompt 025 (Sakai 2001 acquisition) to high-priority.
